mapper.select: SELECT MASK_CD AS maskCd ,MASK_NM AS maskNm FROM TBMASKCD WHERE 1=1
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBMASKCD WHERE MASK_CD = #{maskCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT EAI_IF_DATA_SEQ_NBR as ifDataSeq, EAI_IF_DATA_CRT_TMSTMP as ifDataCrtTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TP_CD as ifDataAplyTpCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD as ifDataAplyStsCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TMSTMP as ifDataAplyTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_CD as ifDataAplyErrCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_MSG_CONT as ifDataAplyErrMsg, CD_DMN_LGCL_NM as dmnLgclNm, CD_DMN_PSCL_NM as dmnPsclNm, CD_DMN_CD_VAL as dmnCdVal, CD_DMN_CD_VAL_GLBL_NM as dmnCdValGlbl, CD_DMN_CD_VAL_LCAL_NM as dmnCdValLcal FROM TB_EAI_CD_DMN_CD_VAL_I WHERE (EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'N' OR EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'E') AND (CD_DMN_PSCL_NM ='MASK_TP_CD');
